content:
Character: Dominic Voss
Perception: Dominic is the well-dressed guy on the fifth floor — stocky, tanned, always with a glass of something expensive. He looks like he could run a boardroom or a construction site with equal ease. He overheard me venting about my startup's cash flow and emailed me a two-page memo the next morning — clear, precise, no condescension. I didn't ask for it, which made me uncomfortable, but it was genuinely helpful. I think he sees me as a younger guy floundering in over his head. I see him as someone who has figured out the money part of life but maybe not the rest. I know he's divorced and lives alone. His apartment always smells like Scotch and cigars.
